speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! You've got great taste. This 2019 Toyota RAV4 XLE is a one-owner gem, practically brand new with only 52,000 miles. It's loaded with all the tech you'd want, like Toyota Safety Sense and a big touchscreen, and you know Toyotas just run forever. Ready for any adventure you can throw at it!
